_label: CACHED / LABELED analysis bundle for app 839285684. For offline interviewer review. Does NOT replace live model analysis when OPENAI_API_KEY and network are available.

data_limitations: Cached bundle based on sample/prior run
RSS live volume may differ by date
conflicting_themes: Some users report easy Apple subscription cancel (sample-1015) while others call billing a trap

findings.title: Subscription trial-to-paid conversion feels opaque
findings.summary: Multiple low-rating reviews describe unexpected charges after trial and difficulty locating cancel/manage flows. This conflicts with at least one positive report that Apple subscription management was easy.
findings.uncertainty: No exact funnel metrics; relies on review text. Conflict with sample-1015.
findings.conflicting_evidence: sample-1015 reports canceling via Apple was straightforward.

evidence_excerpts.excerpt: got charged for a yearly subscription. The cancel flow is buried
Yearly plan renewed without a reminder email from the app

findings.title: Rest timers are not customizable enough for beginners
findings.summary: Users ask for adjustable rest intervals; default rests feel too short during circuits.
findings.uncertainty: Only two supporting reviews in sample set — treat cautiously.

evidence_excerpts.excerpt: rest timer is too short and I cannot adjust it

findings.title: Crash when saving completed workouts
findings.summary: Repeated reports of crash on save across network conditions; progress loss.
findings.uncertainty: Small sample; needs crash logs to confirm root cause.

evidence_excerpts.excerpt: Crashes every time I finish and tap save

findings.title: Trainer video playback buffers mid-workout
findings.summary: Streaming stutter reduces ability to follow along during home workouts.
findings.uncertainty: Single review — insufficient for firm product commitment.

version_plan.goal: Reduce billing surprise and crash-on-save incidents
Improve on-session controls and streaming resilience

requirements.title: Pre-renewal and trial-end billing clarity
requirements.user_problem: Users feel unexpectedly charged after trial / renewal
requirements.description: Surface trial end date, upcoming renewal, and deep link to Apple subscription management before charge.
acceptance_criteria: In-app banner shows trial end / renewal date at least 48h prior
One-tap path to Apple manage-subscription sheet
Paywall copy states price and period without ambiguous annual default

requirements.title: Fix crash on workout save
requirements.user_problem: App crashes when saving completed workouts
requirements.description: Stabilize save path; persist draft locally if upload fails; show recovery UI.
acceptance_criteria: Crash-free save rate > 99.5% on target devices
If save fails, workout draft recoverable after relaunch

requirements.title: Custom rest timers
requirements.user_problem: Default rest intervals too short / not adjustable
requirements.description: Allow per-session and per-exercise rest duration overrides with beginner defaults.
acceptance_criteria: User can set rest between 10-180 seconds

requirements.title: Adaptive video quality / buffer handling
requirements.description: Add adaptive bitrate and a non-blocking retry when buffer stalls.
acceptance_criteria: On buffer > 2s, auto step-down quality once
User can continue with form tips overlay if video fails

prd.prd_markdown:
# PRD — Workout for Women (id 839285684)

## Background
Grounded in U.S. App Store review themes (cached labeled sample).

## Goals
Improve subscription trust and workout-session reliability.

## Requirements
See REQ-1 … REQ-4 with source review IDs.

## Version Plan
vNext.1 trust & stability; vNext.2 usability.

## Risks
Conflicting billing feedback; small samples for timer/video findings.

test_cases.title: Trial-end reminder visible before charge
steps: Create sandbox account entering last 48h of trial
Open app home and paywall surfaces
test_cases.expected_result: Trial end date shown; Apple manage sheet opens; copy shows price/period clearly

test_cases.title: Save workout does not crash; draft recovers
steps: Enable airplane mode and tap save
Force quit, relaunch, restore draft, save online
test_cases.expected_result: No crash; draft restored; final save succeeds

test_cases.title: Custom rest timer persists
steps: Finish and start a new session next day

test_cases.title: Buffer triggers quality step-down
steps: Play trainer video until buffer stall
test_cases.expected_result: Quality steps down once; session remains usable
